74893.subject: New idea by trade_soul — check it out
74893.body: #outlook a { padding:0; } body { margin:0;padding:0;-webkit-text-size-adjust:100%;-ms-text-size-adjust:100%; } table, td { border-collapse:collapse;mso-table-lspace:0pt;mso-table-rspace:0pt; } img { border:0;height:auto;line-height:100%; outline:none;text-decoration:none;-ms-interpolation-mode:bicubic; } p { display:block;margin:13px 0; } 96 .mj-outlook-group-fix { width:100% !important; } @import url(https://fonts.googleapis.com/css?family=Roboto:300,400,500,700); @import url(https://fonts.googleapis.com/css?family=Ubuntu:300,400,500,700); @media only screen and (min-width:480px) { .mj-column-per-100 { width:100% !important; max-width: 100%; } .mj-column-per-50 { width:50% !important; max-width: 50%; } } .moz-text-html .mj-column-per-100 { width:100% !important; max-width: 100%; } .moz-text-html .mj-column-per-50 { width:50% !important; max-width: 50%; } @media only screen and (max-width:480px) { table.mj-full-width-mobile { width: 100% !important; } td.mj-full-width-mobile { width: auto !important; } } :root { color-scheme: light dark; supported-color-schemes: light dark; } .main-container { background-color: #fff !important; padding-bottom: 20px; } .main-title { font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Trebuchet MS', Roboto, Ubuntu, sans-serif; font-size: 36px; line-height: 44px; font-weight: 590; color: #000 !important; } .regular-text, .regular-text * { color: #000 !important; } [data-ogsc] .main-container { background-color: #fff !important; } [data-ogsc] .square-btn a { background-color: #010101 !important; color: #F5F5F5 !important; } [data-ogsc] .main-title, .regular-text, .regular-text * { color: #000 !important; } @media (prefers-color-scheme: dark ) { .main-container { background-color: #000 !important; } .square-btn a { background-color: #F5F5F5 !important; color: #010101 !important; } .main-title, .regular-text, .regular-text * { color: #FEFEFE !important; } } @media only screen and (max-width: 500px) { div.main-container > table > tbody > tr > td { padding-left: 20px !important; 74887.subject: The Daily Degen - June 21st, 2026
74887.body:
View this post on the web at https://thedailydegen.substack.com/p/the-daily-degen-june-21st-2026

Happy Sunday good degens! Another day in brypto world! 
Let’s get after it!
As always… stats/alerts/etc at top and tweets/news/links/videos/etc at bottom… and all tweets are hyperlinked so just click on them to pull them up on Twitter/X!
Market Update
Crypto (from @CryptoBubbles
Total Crypto Market Cap: $2.287T
QQQ (Nasdaq 100): $740.62
Gold: $4,154.70
Silver: $64.71
Oil (WTI): $76.54
US 10Y Treasury: 4.455%
Crypto Fear & Greed Index (from coinmarketcap(dot)com): 22
Biggest Price Movers
(From @coingecko top 1000, by 24 hour change)
Spotlight
Want to bet on the World Cup via crypto?!?
The Mantle Ecosystem is the place to do it ya’ll!
As stated in the thread below:
“Trade match outcome markets on @InsightXHQ, gas-free, with onchain receipts and live prices shaped as new information comes in… 
@Fluxion_network, now integrated with InsightX, lets you trade the America Index vs Europe Index, based on which side performs better by the end of the World Cup…
@Bybit_Official Football Season 2026 turns every trade, daily task, and correct call into points… Build your score through the World Cup and compete for a share of $1,000,000 in $MNT…”
This is just one area that Mantle is stacking W’s in, as they continue to build big in the world of RWA’s, the world of fintech, and see huge success in defi as well! Learn more about all of these areas in Mantle’s most recent news breakdown [ https://substack.com/redirect/34ccecc7-d763-4aba-accd-34c2c2b46ed3?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ]!
And make sure to follow @Mantle_Official [ https://substack.com/redirect/5a0a2bdf-9acb-4d61-bb8e-bcaf4451b1fc?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ] on Twitter/X, and stay tuned as we keep shining a light on all the cool stuff they are doing!
Biggest TVL Movers + Other Interesting Data
Chains are mostly green today. Top-performing chains on the weekly with at least $1M TVL are Immutable zkEVM, Yominet, and MAP Protocol. 
Protocols are mixed today. Top-performing protocols on the weekly with at least $1M TVL are Hyperliquid yield protocol Hyward, Solana farm StakePoint, and multichain payments protocol Hedgey. 
Here’s The Top 12 Chains By TVL (from @DefiLlama):
Here’s The Top 12 Protocols By TVL (from @DefiLlama):
Here’s The Top 10 Entities By 7 Day Revenue Generation (from @DefiLlama):
New Projects
(note: this includes new projects we find through combing Twitter each day and going through newly launched protocols added by @DefiLlama, limited primarily to new projects that have at least some TVL or are followed by at least some of our mutuals… Disclaimer: these are not pre-vetted by us so make sure to DYOR!)
-New/newish project called @Zerg_App. Twitter bio states “Next-gen Gacha Infrastructure for Digital Asset distribution Backed by @reforge_vc”. Followed by 3 of our mutuals. 
Top Stabl

74886.subject: Will Israel undermine America’s peace with Iran?
74886.body:
<link rel=stylesheet href=https://marber-cdn.economist.com/foundations/latest/css/font-face.css>
 The Economist

 
 


 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
https://click.e.economist.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ5MTR9AAcAAAAAAwJ2_anknQfnX9WS5pR8YaSsxt3HXRyDbR0KAeoLbo-gGYILcJ4pya3H8i3k-0IP-YGQP4DKq_h0WMJ3thUJmwFfxGVzhyl8IS52na2B4zk 

June 21st 2026

 

 
 
 
The Economist Today

 A Sunday edition of our daily newsletter


 
 
 

 
https://click.e.economist.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ5MTR9AAcAAAAAAwJ2_anlSb_fbWQ_Pd8I55MQ1TJZ4ftP8Id9U4GkgG_i1sQn8HDhBSlpiwyl0pArZRAVhsSYd4Zivu3rCwYsXbAuOLbWVMxxX05srWXnhBw 

https://click.e.economist.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ5MTR9AAcAAAAAAwJ2_anmNJyNznwVn7DnnwD0HxHe3nq1uJUyIOLtGbcC3osrvZGlU5AkMZVzUk_5d2E5w4Trlf110JLuiHRaPnLE-xFDn8ExChYvvZUqnOs 



 
 

Lane Greene

Senior digital editor



 Difficult negotiations are sometimes described as multidimensional chess. The cliche is more apt than usual as American and Iranian envoys meet in Switzerland, while Israel and Hizbullah, their respective allies, continue attacking each other. That could 
 
https://click.e.economist.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ5MTR9AAcAAAAAAwJ2_annn51c3wvJ2J0g2i0YSAObYB9taccrF01mr5by27bjQI9os3z6cdSBlDjASinyHDmKv7rzBxSoa4f0uqgm03VKVw1uzK_TjQ 
undermine talks  
 that were not going to be easy at the best of times (which these are not).


 And Chinese AI is a bit behind the American kind, but generally thought much cheaper. But our analysis, including of a much-hyped new Chinese model, shows that China may be both 
 
https://click.e.economist.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjE

>>>>>>>>>

>>>>>>>>> пише:
>>>>>>>>>
>>>>>>>>>> Zdravíme nevestu💍🤍,
>>>>>>>>>>
>>>>>>>>>> Ďakujeme veľmi pekne za vašu správu.. Termín svadby máme ešte
>>>>>>>>>> voľný a veľmi radi budeme súčasťou vašej svadby.🤍
>>>>>>>>>>
>>>>>>>>>> Spravidla sa s klientami stretávame osobne v showroome v
>>>>>>>>>> Rozhanovciach (kúsok od Košíc) kde si spolu vieme vyskladať svadobnú
>>>>>>>>>> výzdobu a na základe toho vytvoriť cenovú ponuku na mieru pre vás ak by ste
>>>>>>>>>> mali záujem prosím navrhnite deň a čas kedy by vám to najviac vyhovovalo
>>>>>>>>>> aby sa časovo radi prispôsobíme vášmu času. Poprípade, ak sme mimo Košíc či
>>>>>>>>>> Prešova, radi si s Vami dohodneme videohovor. Prosím navrhnite deň a čas,
>>>>>>>>>> ktorý by Vám vyhovoval najviac, pokojne aj cez víkend aj vo večerných
>>>>>>>>>> hodinách. 🙂 Najbližsie voľne termíny máme ešte aj tento týždeň. Forme
>>>>>>>>>> stret
